rules.rule_text:
rule adWind
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/04"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/AAR"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$meta = "META-INF"
		$conf = "config.xml"
		$a = "Adwind.class"
		$b = "Principal.adwind"

	condition:
		all of them
}
